name: org-roam-toolkit
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace: org-roam knowledge management workflows, MCP server, fetch + OCR helpers, and an observability dashboard. The runtime bins ship via Homebrew (iwangkaimin/tap).

plugins.name: org-roam-toolkit
plugins.description: End-to-end org-roam workflows for Claude Code: 9 slash commands (note / study / deep_note / reference / ref-extract / to-read / read-history / add-toolkit / gen-commit-msg), 5 skills (atomic-notes / org / org-roam / fetch / dashboard), and the org-roam MCP server. Requires `brew install iwangkaimin/tap/org-roam-toolkit`.
